2026-04-17T06:47:06.6638301Z   script: const { setupGlobals } = require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/setup_globals.cjs');

await main();

2026-04-17T06:47:06.6640770Z   user-agent: actions/github-script
